## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? Link any related issue. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation / meta
- [ ] Build / CI
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)

## Checklist

- [ ] `./gradlew testDebugUnitTest assembleRelease` passes locally
- [ ] Added or updated tests for the change (regression test for bug fixes)
- [ ] Updated `README.md` / `docs/` if behavior, install, or public API changed
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under an `## [Unreleased]` section if user-facing
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (Kotlin stdlib + `kotlinx-coroutines-core` only)
- [ ] Keeps the SDK headless and privacy-first (no UI, tracking, identifiers, logging)
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits
